description: Atlantic Union Bankshares Corporation operates as the bank holding company for Atlantic Union Bank that provides banking and related financial products and services to consumers and businesses in the United States. The company operates in two segments, Wholesale Banking and Consumer Banking. It accepts various deposit products, including checking, savings, time deposit, and money market accounts; certificates of deposit; and other depository services. The company provides loans for commercial real estate, commercial, industrial, residential mortgage, and consumer purposes, as well as debit and
